quicksight.template.layout.CfnAbout:
A `Layout` defines the placement of elements within a sheet.

For more information, see [Types of layout](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/types-of-layout.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.template.layout.Configuration.Description: The configuration that determines what the type of layout for a sheet.
